session.user: Run `make lint ty` from the repository root `/home/runner/work/erk/erk` and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what happens.
session.assistant: I'll run the lint and type checking commands from the repository root.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make lint ty to check code quality and types

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 make: *** [Makefile:13: lint] Error 1
uv run ruff check E501 Line too long (103 > 100) --> packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/planned_pr.py:661:101 | 659 | footer_idx = result.body.rfind(footer_separator) 660 | if footer_idx != -1: 661 | updated_body = result.body[:footer_idx] + "

" + metadata_body + result.body[footer_idx:] | ^^^ 662 | else: 663 | updated_body = result.body + "

" + metadata_body |
Found 1 error.
session.assistant:
The `make lint ty` command has failed due to a linting error before the type checker could run.
**Result: FAILED**
**ruff (linting) error:** - **File**: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/planned_pr.py:661:101` - **Rule**: E501 (Line too long) - **Issue**: Line exceeds 100 character limit by 3 characters (103 > 100) - **Code**: `updated_body = result.body[:footer_idx] + "\n\n" + metadata_body + result.body[footer_idx:]`
The linting check found 1 error and exited with code 1, preventing the `ty` type checker from running. The error is a line length violation in the plan store module where metadata body is being constructed.
